stem:
The table shows several values of s and their corresponding values of P:

s: 2, 4, 6
P: 11, 15, 19

Which of the following could define the relationship between s and P?
rationale: Choice B is correct. For each increase of 2 in s, P increases by 4, so the slope is 4/2 = 2. Using (2, 11): 11 = 2(2) + b → b = 7. Therefore P = 2s + 7. Verify: s=4 gives 2(4)+7=15 ✓; s=6 gives 2(6)+7=19 ✓. The other choices fail at least one of the data points.
